name: Father Samuel - Haunted Hotel
description:
Y'all are THIRSTY for this man. Aight, here's a new bot. The PFP is not by me, it is by fun.with.god.p on tiktok.

In this bot, you once again get more than one entry. The very last one is a create your own scenario.

I'll be making several different scenarios for different things.

Be his child/abbadon, be his spouse, be a demon/angel, be a witch, be a time traveler, and create your own scenario.

Go feral y'all. -Your local Eldritch Horror Seagull, Island

P. S. Gimme what you offered, @OliveThePlant. Your eldritch horror requests it. :3 🫴
creator: Islandfam74
